verses.text: Judah gamsungah Pasian kithei a, Israel gamsungah ama min lian hi
Zion khuasungah ama ten'na mun kibawl hi
Amah in tua lai-ah thaltangte, lum, namsau, leh galhiamte a kuaitan hi
A om ngitnget mual liante sangin na min thangzaw a, na lianzaw hi
A thahatte' neihsa nate kisutkhia a, amaute ihmucip suak uh hi
Jakob' Pasian aw, nangma thuhilhna hangin sakol leh a tung tuangpa khawlcip uh hi
Ahih hangin nang na kihtakhuai mahmah hi. Na heh khit phot ciangin nangma mai-ah kua ding ngam nawn ding ahi hiam
Vantung panin thukhenna na genkhia hi. Gimna a thuak leitung mi khempeuh a hon dingin thukhen dingin Pasian a kipat ciangin leitung lau mahmahin tang hetloin a om khikhe hi
Mihingte' hehna in nang hong kiphatna ding piangsak ding a, na hehna panin a suakta mite in nangmah pahtawina pawi a bawl ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian' tungah na thuciamnate uh pia un la, tuate khempeuh zui un. Leitung kumpite sangin a kihtakhuai zaw, uliante' lungsim a niamkhiat, zahtak ding ahipa' tungah, ama kiimah a om mi khempeuhte in letsong puak ta uh hen!
